title: aporum ovatipetalum
side_effects: Aporum ovatipetalum can have side effects if used improperly, such as causing gastrointestinal problems, including nausea and diarrhea, due to its high concentration of toxic compounds. Ingesting large quantities of the plant's extracts can also lead to liver and kidney damage, as well as increased heart rate and blood pressure. Furthermore, improper use of Aporum ovatipetalum can result in allergic reactions, including skin rashes and respiratory issues. Prolonged exposure to the plant's toxic compounds can also have long-term effects, such as damage to the nervous system and reproductive organs.
